text: Hi Jordan, I noticed the bilge pump cycle is longer than normal. Can you keep an eye on the bilge level today?
Sure, I can monitor it. Is there anything specific I should check besides the pump itself?
Check the intake screen for debris and verify the float switch is moving freely without sticking.
I’ll do that and let you know if I see any clogging or abnormal movement.
Thanks. If the issue persists, we may need to replace the pump seals and test the discharge line.
Understood. I’ll follow up after the afternoon check.
